recommendations.title: Man on the Moon
recommendations.overview: The story of the life and career of eccentric avant-garde comedian, Andy Kaufman.

recommendations.title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
recommendations.overview: A petty criminal fakes insanity to serve his sentence in a mental ward rather than prison. He soon finds himself as a leader to the other patients—and an enemy to the cruel, domineering nurse who runs the ward.

recommendations.title: Hair
recommendations.overview: Upon receiving his draft notice and leaving his family ranch in Oklahoma, Claude heads to New York and befriends a tribe of long-haired hippies on his way to boot camp.

recommendations.title: Ragtime
recommendations.overview: A young black pianist becomes embroiled in the lives of an upper-class white family set among the racial tensions, infidelity, violence, and other nostalgic events in early 1900s New York City.

recommendations.title: Goya's Ghosts
recommendations.overview: Painter Francisco Goya becomes involved with the Spanish Inquisition after his muse, Inés, is arrested by the church for heresy. Her family turns to him, hoping that his connection with fanatical Inquisitor Lorenzo, whom he is painting, can secure he

recommendations.title: Taking Off
recommendations.overview: Unable to deal with her parents, Jeannie Tyne runs away from home. Larry and Lynn Tyne search for her, and in the process meet other people whose children ran away. With their children gone, the parents are now free to rediscover/enjoy life.

recommendations.title: The Firemen's Ball
recommendations.overview: The firemen of a provincial Czechoslovakian town throw a ball in honor of the old chief's retirement. There will be music and dancing, a beauty pageant and a raffle. The whole town will be in attendance. However, the proceedings are dogged by difficu

recommendations.title: The People vs. Larry Flynt
recommendations.overview: Larry Flynt is the hedonistically obnoxious, but indomitable, publisher of Hustler magazine. The film recounts his struggle to make an honest living publishing his girlie magazine and how it changes into a battle to protect the freedom of speech for

recommendations.title: Django
recommendations.overview: The story of Django Reinhardt, famous guitarist and composer, and his flight from German-occupied Paris in 1943.

recommendations.title: Valmont
recommendations.overview: Set in Baroque France, a scheming widow and her lover make a bet regarding the corruption of a recently married woman. The lover, Valmont, bets that he can seduce her, even though she is an honorable woman. If he wins, he can have his lover to do as
